title: HikkoCraft 2
description: A beautiful world to explore and conquer with your friends.
body:
HikkoCraft is a mod-pack for exploring with your friends. With BSL Shaders and Faithful 32x, everything looks beautiful and with Immersive Sounds everything sounds that way too. Explore new Dimensions, plunder the dungeons, defeat new bosses!

Thanks to:

CaptTatsu's BSL Shaders: https://bitslablab.com/, 

ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village Mod: https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village
 
RiDG08 for their More Overlays Updated mod: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-overlays-updated


Support is available on the Discord.
